rulings.Case Title: JAMES FARRIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 06, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiff's motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to May 7, 2014. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD MELVIN UHR et al VS. AMERICAN LAFRANCE LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 06, 2014 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Mine Safety Appliances Company's demurrer to first amended complaint is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)

Brady Company, Inc.'s motion to abate entire action pending joinder of all necessary parties is continued on the court's own motion to May 7, 2014. = (503/TLJ)
